brand.name: AUXSAYS
brand.tagline: Tactical knowledge for creators who want control

home.kicker: Publication hub • App-first guides • Sharper systems
home.headline: Tactical knowledge for creators who want control.
home.lead: AUXSAYS is a modern resource hub focused on real free AI tools, cleaner content systems, practical automation, and LMS workflows that hold up under actual use.

brief.title: Modern tactical editorial
brief.body: Cleaner structure, tighter typography, and practical information built to stay useful after the first read.

brief.title: AI tools, content workflows, and training systems
brief.body: App-first guides, creator workflows, automation, and LMS infrastructure without fake-free fluff or vague stack worship.

brief.title: Control over the workflow
brief.body: Less noise. Less lock-in. More legible systems, cleaner outputs, and better decisions before you waste time or money.

home.coverage_intro: App-first tool guides, production systems, lightweight automation, and training infrastructure that hold up under real use.

pillars.title: Free AI Tools
pillars.detail: Separate the genuinely useful free tools from the fake-free products that trap output, exports, or quality halfway through the workflow.

pillars.title: Content Workflows
pillars.detail: Repurposing, editing, export planning, and system design for creators who want speed without turning everything into low-grade slop.

pillars.title: Automation Productivity
pillars.detail: Use lightweight automation and process logic to remove friction from repetitive work without overbuilding the whole stack.

pillars.title: LMS Training Systems
pillars.detail: Instructional design, Moodle administration, reporting, media, and process structure for organizations that need training delivered clearly and at scale.

about.title: Auxilium
about.intro1: Aux is an LMS administrator and instructional design professional specializing in medical-field instruction, advanced multimedia integration, and production workflows. His work includes building training systems and digital learning experiences for orthopedic education and government hospital environments.
about.intro2: He brings a strong background in multimedia production, combining instructional strategy with video, design, and technical systems thinking to improve how organizations deliver training at scale. Current focus areas include live broadcasting and broadcast workflows built with Unreal Engine 5.
about.primaryBody: Workflow architecture, reporting, support, process structure, and platform stewardship.
about.secondaryBody: Training systems, multimedia learning, content sequencing, and delivery at scale.
about.thesis: Build systems that are practical, scalable, and technically honest. Reduce friction. Improve outputs. Keep the workflow legible.
about.interests: Real free AI utilities, advanced creator workflows, systems automation, live broadcasting, GitHub Pages publishing, and Unreal Engine 5 pipeline design.
